# NEXXAI

> AI-first product and software studio. We design, build and ship AI agents, web and mobile apps, and custom platforms, from first idea to production. Building since 2015.

## About
NEXXAI builds production AI (agents, ML models, RAG assistants), custom software and SaaS, and native and cross-platform mobile and web apps for startups and enterprises. One senior team takes a product from first idea to shipped. Delivery hubs in Barcelona (Spain), Boston (USA), Florida (USA), Lahore (Pakistan), Ukraine (Kyiv) and Turkey (Istanbul).

## Key pages
- [Home](https://nexxai.world/): overview of services and approach
- [Services](https://nexxai.world/services.html): AI agents, custom software, SaaS, mobile and web apps, UI/UX, DevOps
- [AI Lab](https://nexxai.world/ai-lab.html): applied AI work
- [Upskilling](https://nexxai.world/upskilling.html): AI training for teams
- [Portfolio](https://nexxai.world/work.html): shipped projects
- [Company](https://nexxai.world/company.html): about, clients, hubs
- [Insights](https://nexxai.world/insights/): blog (coming soon)
